news.headline: BHEL Floats Tender for 1.5 MW Rooftop Solar Project in Bhopal
news.summary: Listen to this article Bharat Heavy Electricals (BHEL) has invited bids to set up a 1,500 kW grid-connected rooftop solar project at its facility in

news.headline: Indraprastha Gas Tenders 160 MW Solar Project With 28 MWh Battery Storage
news.summary: Indrapastha Gas (IGL), a joint venture of GAIL India, BPCL, and the Government of Delhi, has invited bids to set up a 160 MW solar power project with a 28 MWh battery storage system in Rajasthan. The successful bidder must operate and maintain the project for five years.

news.headline: Terra Clean Issues Land Aggregation Tender for 100 MW Solar Project
news.summary: Terra Clean, a wholly owned subsidiary of Indian Oil Corporation, has issued a request for proposal to aggregate land for an interstate transmission system (ISTS) -connected 100 MW solar project near the Davanagere ISTS Pooling Substation in Karnataka.

news.headline: RUMSL Invites Bids for Land for Solar Projects in Madhya Pradesh
news.summary: Rewa Ultra Mega Solar (RUMSL) has invited expressions of interest for the purchase of private land parcels from prospective land owners to set up solar projects in Madhya Pradesh.

news.headline: Rajasthan Brings Renewable Energy Projects Under Land Conversion Framework
news.summary: The Rajasthan Government has amended the Rajasthan Land Revenue (Conversion of Agricultural Land for Non-Agricultural Purposes in Rural Areas) Rules, 2007, bringing renewable energy projects’ within the land conversion framework.

news.headline: Germany Awards 2.3 GW Solar Capacity in the March Round
news.summary: Germany’s Federal Network Agency (Bundesnetzagentur) has awarded 268 bids for solar installations with a combined capacity of 2,299 MW in its March 2026 solar PV auction.

news.headline: India Adds Record 15.3 GW of Solar Capacity in Q1 2026
news.summary: India installed 15.3 GW of solar capacity in Q1 2026, its highest-ever quarterly total, according to Mercom India’s Q1 2026 India Solar Market Update Report.

news.headline: Strong US Demand Pushes Nextpower’s FY 2026 Revenue Up 20%
news.summary: U.S.-based solar tracker firm Nextpower reported revenue of $880.5 million in the fourth quarter (Q4) of the financial year (FY) 2026, a 4.7% year-over-year (YoY) decrease from $924.3 million. The revenue exceeded analysts’ expectations by $50.7 million. The company said Q4 revenue was affected b

news.headline: Tata Power’s Q4 FY 2026 Revenue Falls 8% on Lower EPC Revenue
news.summary: Listen to this article Integrated power company Tata Power reported a revenue of ₹159.62 billion (~$1.67 billion) in the fourth quarter (Q4) of the financial year (FY)

news.headline: Daily News Wrap-Up: Tamil Nadu Issues Draft MYT Framework Until FY 2032
news.summary: The Tamil Nadu Electricity Regulatory Commission (TNERC) released its draft multi-year tariff (MYT) regulations for distribution licensees (DISCOMs) covering financial years 2027-28 to 2031-32.

news.headline: Inox Clean acquires US solar manufacturing assets from Boviet Solar for $750 million
news.summary: Inox Clean said the localised manufacturing footprint in the US would help reduce tariff- and policy-related risks while improving profitability.

news.headline: WABAG and PEAK announce Bio-CNG plant in Uttar Pradesh
news.summary: VA TECH WABAG LIMITED (WABAG) and PEAK Sustainability Ventures have launched a Bio-CNG plant in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh. The project will be set up at a 70 million litres per day sewage treatment plant in

news.headline: HPCL announces financial results for FY 2025-26
news.summary: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) has announced the results for the financial year (FY) 2025-26, ending March 31, 2026. The company’s revenue from operations stood at Rs 4,785.43 billion in FY 2025-26, registering a 2.62

news.headline: Ceigall India to set up 50 MW BESS project in Punjab
news.summary: Ceigall India Limited has secured an order from Punjab State Power Corporation Limited (PSPCL) to set up a 50 MW standalone battery energy storage system (BESS) project in Punjab. The project has been awarded under

news.headline: Bajel Projects bags transmission line order for Bellary-Davanagere RE evacuation
news.summary: Bajel Projects Limited has secured an order for the Bellary-Davanagere transmission line Package TL01. The project involves the construction of an approximately 70 km 400 kV (Quad) double-circuit transmission line connecting the Bellary Substation and

news.headline: J&V Energy Technology to acquire 187 MW solar portfolio in Taiwan
news.summary: J&V Energy Technology Co., Ltd. has signed an agreement to acquire a portfolio of operational solar plants in Taiwan. The portfolio includes 42 operating solar plants located across Central and Southern Taiwan with a combined

news.headline: Meta and DESRI sign 850 MW clean power PPAs in US
news.summary: DESRI and Meta have signed 850 MW of solar and battery storage power purchase agreements (PPAs) in US. The agreement includes 500 MW in Oklahoma, 200 MW in Texas and 150 MW in Mississippi. With

news.headline: Germany awards 2.2 GW of solar capacity
news.summary: The Federal Network Agency of Germany has announced the results of its March 1, 2026 solar PV auction which was oversubscribed. The tender covered 2,295 MW of ground-mounted and special-structure solar projects. A total of

news.headline: Cleantech Solar and Sona Comstar ink PPA for open access solar project in Tamil Nadu
news.summary: Cleantech Solar has signed a power purchase agreement (PPA) with Sona BLW Precision Forgings Limited (Sona Comstar). Under the agreement, Sona Comstar will procure power on a group captive basis from Cleantech Solar’s open access

news.headline: Tata Power announces financial results for FY 2025-26
news.summary: Tata Power has announced the results for the financial year (FY) 2025-26, ending March 31, 2026. The company’s consolidated revenue from operations stood at Rs 636.81 billion in FY 2025-26, registering a 1.27 per cent

news.headline: CleanMax announces financial results for FY 2025-26
news.summary: CleanMax has announced the results for the financial year (FY) 2025-26. The company reported revenue from operations of Rs 19.13 billion, which rose from Rs 14.96 billion in FY2024-25. This reflects a 28 per cent

news.headline: Hybrid energy systems: Combining solar, wind & storage for maximum efficiency
news.summary: Hybrid energy systems are set to play a crucial role in shaping the future of energy infrastructure. With advancements in smart grid technologies, artificial intelligence, and predictive analytics, these systems will become even more efficient and adaptive. news.headline: Adani Green commissions 150 MW solar capacity at Khavda
news.summary: Adani Green Energy Ltd (AGEL) has commissioned a 150 MW solar power project at Khavda, taking its total operational renewable energy generation capacity to 19,735.8 MW and its operational battery energy storage system (BESS) capacity to 1,376 MWh.
